Date of Order: 7th March, 2026
In the matter of
Petition under Section 63 of the Electricity A...
obligations.risk_level: Medium (Pending adoption of tariff)
obligations.affected_entity: Transmission Service Provider, Inter State transmission systems
obligations.short_summary: Order issued for adopting competitive bidded tariffs in Transmission Services and inter-State lines.

obligations.obligation:
…Respondents
Parties Present:
Shri Siddharth Patnaik, Advocate, ASTL
Shri Ankit Konwar, Advocate, ASTL
Ms. Aafreen Khan, Advocate, ASTL

ORDER
The Petitioner, Angul Sundargarh Transmission Limited, has filed the present
Petition under Section 63 of the Electricity Act, 20...
obligations.risk_level: Medium (High if penalty)
obligations.affected_entity: DISCOM, GENCO, Licensee, RE Developer, General
obligations.short_summary: Angul Sundargarh Transmission Limited seeks adoption of transmission charges for ERGS-I on BOOT Basis.

obligations.obligation:
Section 63 of the Act provides as under:
“Section 63: Determination of tariff by bidding process: Notwithstanding
anything contained in section 62, the Appropriate Commission shall adopt the
tariff if such tariff has been determined through transparent process of bidding
in accordance with the guide...
obligations.risk_level: Medium (depends on the timeliness of adopting tariffs)
obligations.short_summary: Tariff determination via bidding process as per Central Government guidelines.

obligations.obligation:
The Ministry of Power, Government of India, has notified the “Tariff based
Competitive bidding Guidelines for Transmission Service” and “Guidelines for
Encouraging Competition in Development of Transmission Projects‟ (hereinafter
referred to as “the Guidelines‟) under Section 63 of the Act vide Reso...
obligations.risk_level: Medium
obligations.short_summary: Implementation of Tariff based Competitive bidding Guidelines for Transmission Service

obligations.obligation:
(b) For procurement of the transmission services required for any inter-
State transmission Project, the Central Government shall notify the CTUIL or
any Central Government Organization/ Central Public Sector Undertaking or
its wholly owned subsidiary (Special Purpose Vehicle) to be the Bid Process
...
obligations.risk_level: Medium
obligations.affected_entity: GENCO, DISCOM, Licensee, RE Developer, Central Government Organization/Central Public Sector Undertaking or its wholly owned subsidiary (Special Purpose Vehicle)
obligations.short_summary: Notification of BPC for coordinating bid process in inter-State transmission projects.

obligations.obligation:
(c) The BPC shall prepare the bid documents in accordance with the
Guidelines and obtain approval of the Appropriate Government, or
alternatively, the BPC can use the Standard Bid Documents notified by the
Ministry of Power.
obligations.risk_level: Medium (depends on timely approval)
obligations.short_summary: Preparation and submission of bid documents as per guidelines or approved standard forms.

obligations.obligation:
Any material deviation from the Standard Bidding
Documents shall be made only with the prior approval of the Appropriate
Government.
obligations.risk_level: Medium (Non-approval of bidding documents can lead to delays or disqualification)
obligations.affected_entity: DISCOM, GENCO, Licensee, RE Developer, General
obligations.short_summary: Material deviation from Standard Bidding Documents requires prior government approval.

obligations.obligation:
Intimation about initiation of the bidding process shall be sent by
the BPC to the Appropriate Commission.
obligations.risk_level: Medium (High if not followed within the stipulated time)
obligations.short_summary: Notification to Commission for bidding initiation by BPC.

obligations.obligation:
(d) For the procurement of the transmission services under the guidelines,
BPC shall adopt a single stage two envelope tender process featuring
Request for Proposal (RfP).
obligations.risk_level: Medium
obligations.short_summary: Procurement of transmission services through a single-stage two envelope RfP tender process.

obligations.obligation:
The entire bidding process shall be conducted
online through electronic medium under e-reverse bidding framework.
obligations.risk_level: Medium (if not conducted online as per regulation)
obligations.short_summary: Electronic bidding process mandated for compliance.

obligations.obligation:
(e) RfP notice should be published in at least two national newspapers,
website of the BPC and preferably in trade magazines also, so as to accord it
wide publicity.
obligations.risk_level: Low to Medium
obligations.short_summary: RfP notice must be published in multiple media outlets for public awareness.

obligations.obligation:
The bidding shall necessarily be by way of International
Order in Petition No. 825/AT/2025
Page 6Competitive Bidding (ICB).
obligations.risk_level: Medium (High if penalty)
obligations.short_summary: Competitive Bidding process for International Order in Petition No. 825/AT/2025

obligations.obligation:
For the purpose of issue of RfP, minimum
conditions to be met by the bidder shall be specified in the RfP.
obligations.risk_level: Medium (specifying minimum conditions in RfP is a standard procedure)
obligations.short_summary: Bidders must meet specified criteria for issuing Requests For Proposals.

obligations.obligation:
(f) Standard documentation to be provided in the RfP shall include
definitions of requirements including brief description of the Project,
commissioning milestones to be achieved by the bidders, qualification
requirements to be met by the bidders including, minimum net worth, etc.
obligations.risk_level: Medium (High if documentation is incomplete)
obligations.short_summary: Provision of standard project requirements and qualifications in the Request for Proposal.

obligations.obligation:
with
necessary proof of the same, as outlined in the bid documents, Specified
target dates/months for commissioning and commercial operations, Standard
Transmission Service Agreement (TSA), agreement(s) under the Central
Electricity Regulatory Commission (Sharing of Inter State Transmission
Charges ...
obligations.risk_level: High - due to the requirement of obtaining a transmission license from an Appropriate Commission which is critical for project approval.
obligations.due_date: specified in bid documents, within X days after submission or N/A if not specified
obligations.short_summary: Bidders must submit necessary proof as per bid documents, specify commissioning and commercial operation dates in TSA agreements, comply with inter-state regulations, provide details on offer validity period, amendments to the proposed agreement, evaluation methodology by BPC, bid bond specifications including performance guarantee requirements, propose an indemnification agreement between SPV/TSP and Nodal Agency, detail liquidated damages for service delays, meet technical criteria set forth by regulatory bodies.

obligations.obligation:
(h) To ensure competitiveness, the minimum number of qualified bidders
shall be two.
obligations.risk_level: Medium
obligations.affected_entity: Licensee or DISCOM (depending on the context)
obligations.short_summary: Ensure at least two qualified bidders for competitiveness.

obligations.obligation:
For inter-State transmission system, bids shall be opened in the
Order in Petition No. 825/AT/2025
Page 7office of the CEA by a bid committee comprising of at least one member from
CEA and one member from BPC.
obligations.risk_level: Medium (High if bid is not opened in time)
obligations.short_summary: Inter-State transmission system bids to be reviewed by a CEA and BPC member committee.

obligations.obligation:
For inter-State transmission system, CEA
shall constitute a committee for evaluation of the bids with at least one
representative from the CEA and not less than two representatives from the
concerned Regional Power Committees and one independent member.
obligations.risk_level: Low (as it is a procedural requirement)
obligations.affected_entity: GENCO, DISCOM, Licensee, RE Developer, General
obligations.short_summary: Establishment of an evaluation committee for inter-State transmission bids.

obligations.obligation:
Further, in case project is inter-regional, there shall be at least one
representative from every concerned RPC.
obligations.risk_level: Medium to High depending on the project's complexity and regulatory requirements across regions involved.
obligations.short_summary: Ensure representation from all concerned Regional Power Committees for projects spanning multiple states.

obligations.obligation:
The technical bids shall be
examined to ensure that the bids submitted meet minimum eligibility criteria
set out in the bid documents on all the technical evaluation parameters.
obligations.risk_level: Medium (if bids do not meet criteria)
obligations.short_summary: Ensure technical bid compliance with set parameters

obligations.obligation:
Only
the bids that meet all elements of the minimum technical criteria set out in the
bid documents shall be considered for further evaluation on the transmission
charges bids.
obligations.risk_level: Low (as it is a standard requirement)
obligations.short_summary: Transmission charges bids must meet minimum technical criteria for further evaluation.

obligations.obligation:
The online initial price bids shall be electronically opened by the
bid opening committee in the presence of the bid evaluation committee.
obligations.risk_level: Medium (High if bid opening is delayed or not transparent)
obligations.affected_entity: DISCOM, GENCO, Licensee, RE Developer, General
obligations.short_summary: Electronic initiation of online initial price bids by the committee.

obligations.obligation:
The
bidder who has quoted the lowest transmission charge as per the evaluation
procedure shall be considered for the award.
obligations.risk_level: Medium (consideration for award implies a process that may have associated risks)
obligations.short_summary: Bidding entity with lowest transmission charge to be awarded

obligations.obligation:
(i) The BPC is required to complete e-reverse bidding after opening of the
initial offer within 75 days.
obligations.risk_level: Medium - High, depending on the proximity to deadline and potential consequences of non-compliance
obligations.due_date: within 75 days from initial bid open date or 'N/A' if already completed

obligations.obligation:
The procurer may give extended time frame
indicated herein based on the prevailing circumstances, and such alterations
shall not be construed to be deviation from these guidelines.
obligations.risk_level: Low (assuming no penalty is mentioned)
obligations.due_date: within X days/months or 'N/A' depending on the context provided in full document
obligations.short_summary: Extended time frame for reporting may be granted based on circumstances without being considered a deviation from guidelines.

obligations.obligation:
(j) The TSP shall make an application for the grant of a transmission
licence to the Appropriate Commission within five (5) working days from the
date of execution of the Share Purchase Agreement for acquisition of the
SPV.
obligations.risk_level: Medium (if not filed within the specified timeframe)
obligations.affected_entity: DISCOM, GENCO, Licensee, RE Developer, General
obligations.short_summary: Filing application for transmission license post-share purchase agreement.

obligations.obligation:
Order in Petition No. 825/AT/2025
Page 8(k) The BPC shall make the final result of evaluation of all bids public.
obligations.risk_level: Low (no penalty mentioned)
obligations.short_summary: Public disclosure of bid evaluation results required by BPC.

obligations.obligation:
The
final TSA, along with the certification by the bid evaluation committee, shall be
forwarded to the Appropriate Commission, for the adoption of tariff discovered
from the quoted annual transmission charges during the e-reverse bidding
process in terms of Section 63 of the Act.
obligations.risk_level: Medium (High if not adopted in a timely manner)
obligations.short_summary: Final TSA and certification must be submitted for tariff adoption.

obligations.obligation:
Intimation regarding the initiation of the bid process
was given to this Commission on 29.1.2025 in accordance with Clause 4.2 of the
Guidelines dated 10.8.2021.
obligations.risk_level: Medium (if there is a deadline for response, otherwise Low)
obligations.affected_entity: Licensee or General (depending on who initiated the bid process)
obligations.short_summary: Notification of commencement to Commission as per guideline clause.

obligations.obligation:
No. of Bidders participated in the e-Reverse None
Auction (As mentioned in
para 16 below)
8.
obligations.risk_level: Low (No immediate penalty mentioned)
obligations.affected_entity: DISCOM, GENCO, Licensee, RE Developer, General
obligations.short_summary: Eight entities participated in the e-Reverse None Auction.
